versions.notes: Initial deterministic JSON classification prompt for synthetic support tickets.
versions.template:
Classify this synthetic support ticket. Return only JSON with category, severity, confidence, rationale, and needs_review. Subject: $subject
Body: $body

versions.notes: Adds clearer routing guidance while preserving the TicketClassification output schema.
versions.template:
Classify this synthetic customer-support ticket for routing. Return only JSON using the TicketClassification schema fields: category, severity, confidence, rationale, and needs_review. Use the ticket details as the source of truth and set needs_review when the text includes private or risky account information. Subject: $subject
Body: $body
